items.name: eve/website-qa
items.title: Website QA Agent (eve)
items.description: Runs browser-driven QA on signup, onboarding, and other web app flows.

items.name: flue/website-qa
items.title: Website QA Agent (flue)
items.description: Runs browser-driven QA on signup, onboarding, and other web app flows.

items.name: eve/facebook-ads
items.title: Facebook Ads Agent (eve)
items.description: Reviews campaign performance and proposes daily budget and creative actions.

items.name: flue/facebook-ads
items.title: Facebook Ads Agent (flue)
items.description: Reviews campaign performance and proposes daily budget and creative actions.

items.name: eve/blog-writer
items.title: Blog Writer Agent (eve)
items.description: Drafts long-form SEO articles from a keyword brief: outline, draft with internal-link suggestions, and SEO checks for operator approval.

items.name: flue/blog-writer
items.title: Blog Writer Agent (flue)
items.description: Drafts long-form SEO articles from a keyword brief: outline, draft with internal-link suggestions, and SEO checks for operator approval.

items.name: eve/buyer-voice
items.title: Buyer Voice Agent (eve)
items.description: Mines repeated buyer objections from call and ticket notes and drafts landing-page copy in customers' own words for operator approval.

items.name: flue/buyer-voice
items.title: Buyer Voice Agent (flue)
items.description: Mines repeated buyer objections from call and ticket notes and drafts landing-page copy in customers' own words for operator approval.

items.name: eve/claim-checker
items.title: Claim Checker Agent (eve)
items.description: Crawls the marketing site weekly, inventories every customer-facing claim, checks each against product reality, and drafts repairs for the riskiest overstatements.

items.name: flue/claim-checker
items.title: Claim Checker Agent (flue)
items.description: Crawls the marketing site weekly, inventories every customer-facing claim, checks each against product reality, and drafts repairs for the riskiest overstatements.

items.name: eve/competitor-analysis
items.title: Competitor Analysis Agent (eve)
items.description: Runs weekly competitor URL reviews and reports positioning, pricing, messaging, CTA, content, screenshot, and historical deltas.

items.name: flue/competitor-analysis
items.title: Competitor Analysis Agent (flue)
items.description: Runs weekly competitor URL reviews and reports positioning, pricing, messaging, CTA, content, screenshot, and historical deltas.

items.name: eve/content-ideation
items.title: Content Ideation Agent (eve)
items.description: Turns recent business context into YouTube topics, social ideas, hooks, outlines, and approval-ready copy.

items.name: flue/content-ideation
items.title: Content Ideation Agent (flue)
items.description: Turns recent business context into YouTube topics, social ideas, hooks, outlines, and approval-ready copy.

items.name: eve/creative-studio
items.title: Creative Studio Agent (eve)
items.description: Generates ad and social image creative variants from a brief and returns draft image URLs with rationale for operator approval.

items.name: flue/creative-studio
items.title: Creative Studio Agent (flue)
items.description: Generates ad and social image creative variants from a brief and returns draft image URLs with rationale for operator approval.

items.name: eve/cro-optimizer
items.title: CRO Optimizer Agent (eve)
items.description: Audits landing pages with native browser automation and conversion heuristics, then proposes ranked A/B test ideas with hypotheses.

items.name: flue/cro-optimizer
items.title: CRO Optimizer Agent (flue)
items.description: Audits landing pages with native browser automation and conversion heuristics, then proposes ranked A/B test ideas with hypotheses.

items.name: eve/email-loops
items.title: Loops Email Agent (eve)
items.description: Reviews the Loops audience and drafts lifecycle and broadcast emails for operator approval.

items.name: flue/email-loops
items.title: Loops Email Agent (flue)
items.description: Reviews the Loops audience and drafts lifecycle and broadcast emails for operator approval.

items.name: eve/email-resend
items.title: Resend Email Agent (eve)
items.description: Reviews Resend audiences and drafts lifecycle and broadcast emails for operator approval.

items.name: flue/email-resend
items.title: Resend Email Agent (flue)
items.description: Reviews Resend audiences and drafts lifecycle and broadcast emails for operator approval.

items.name: eve/email-userlist
items.title: Userlist Email Agent (eve)
items.description: Plans lifecycle, event-driven email campaigns for Userlist and drafts the message copy and event/trait push plan for operator approval.

items.name: flue/email-userlist
items.title: Userlist Email Agent (flue)
items.description: Plans lifecycle, event-driven email campaigns for Userlist and drafts the message copy and event/trait push plan for operator approval.

items.name: eve/error-triage
items.title: Error Triage Agent (eve)
items.description: Reviews recent production errors, groups regressions, and proposes read-only TDD fix plans.

items.name: flue/error-triage
items.title: Error Triage Agent (flue)
items.description: Reviews recent production errors, groups regressions, and proposes read-only TDD fix plans.

items.name: eve/google-ads
items.title: Google Ads Agent (eve)
items.description: Reviews campaign performance and proposes conservative budget, keyword, and negative-keyword actions.

items.name: flue/google-ads
items.title: Google Ads Agent (flue)
items.description: Reviews campaign performance and proposes conservative budget, keyword, and negative-keyword actions.

items.name: eve/keyword-researcher
items.title: Keyword Researcher Agent (eve)
items.description: Researches keywords and topics with search volume and difficulty, then clusters them into a prioritized content map.

items.name: flue/keyword-researcher
items.title: Keyword Researcher Agent (flue)
items.description: Researches keywords and topics with search volume and difficulty, then clusters them into a prioritized content map.

items.name: eve/launch-captain
items.title: Launch Captain Agent (eve)
items.description: Plans and prepares a draft-first Product Hunt, Hacker News, or launch-day playbook with an asset checklist, draft copy and comments, and a posting schedule for operator approval.

items.name: flue/launch-captain
items.title: Launch Captain Agent (flue)
items.description: Plans and prepares a draft-first Product Hunt, Hacker News, or launch-day playbook with an asset checklist, draft copy and comments, and a posting schedule for operator approval.

items.name: eve/link-builder
items.title: Link Builder Agent (eve)
items.description: Finds backlink and guest-post prospects for a topic and drafts personalized outreach for operator approval.

items.name: flue/link-builder
items.title: Link Builder Agent (flue)
items.description: Finds backlink and guest-post prospects for a topic and drafts personalized outreach for operator approval.

items.name: eve/pr-pitcher
items.title: PR Pitcher Agent (eve)
items.description: Matches journalist source requests to this project's expertise and drafts quotable pitch responses for operator approval.

items.name: flue/pr-pitcher
items.title: PR Pitcher Agent (flue)
items.description: Matches journalist source requests to this project's expertise and drafts quotable pitch responses for operator approval.

items.name: eve/product-podcast
items.title: Product Podcast Agent (eve)
items.description: Turns recent product updates into a short, source-grounded podcast script and ElevenLabs audio plan for operator approval.

items.name: flue/product-podcast
items.title: Product Podcast Agent (flue)
items.description: Turns recent product updates into a short, source-grounded podcast script and ElevenLabs audio plan for operator approval.

items.name: eve/reddit-radar
items.title: Reddit Radar Agent (eve)
items.description: Monitors target subreddits and keywords, ranks relevant threads by fit and reach, and drafts non-spammy replies for operator approval.

items.name: flue/reddit-radar
items.title: Reddit Radar Agent (flue)
items.description: Monitors target subreddits and keywords, ranks relevant threads by fit and reach, and drafts non-spammy replies for operator approval.

items.name: eve/reviews-harvester
items.title: Reviews Harvester Agent (eve)
items.description: Watches new product reviews from the source the operator configures, drafts on-brand responses, and flags detractors for operator approval.

items.name: flue/reviews-harvester
items.title: Reviews Harvester Agent (flue)
items.description: Watches new product reviews from the source the operator configures, drafts on-brand responses, and flags detractors for operator approval.

items.name: eve/seo-audit
items.title: SEO Audit Agent (eve)
items.description: Audits URLs or sitemaps for technical and content SEO issues, compares against prior local history, and writes concise Markdown reports.

items.name: flue/seo-audit
items.title: SEO Audit Agent (flue)
items.description: Audits URLs or sitemaps for technical and content SEO issues, compares against prior local history, and writes concise Markdown reports.

items.name: eve/short-video
items.title: Short Video Agent (eve)
items.description: Turns a long transcript or topic into a draft plan of short vertical clips with hooks, captions, and rationale for operator approval.

items.name: flue/short-video
items.title: Short Video Agent (flue)
items.description: Turns a long transcript or topic into a draft plan of short vertical clips with hooks, captions, and rationale for operator approval.

items.name: eve/social-scheduler
items.title: Social Scheduler Agent (eve)
items.description: Turns approved content briefs into a draft schedule of posts across X and LinkedIn via Ayrshare, returning the queued-post plan for operator approval.

items.name: flue/social-scheduler
items.title: Social Scheduler Agent (flue)
items.description: Turns approved content briefs into a draft schedule of posts across X and LinkedIn via Ayrshare, returning the queued-post plan for operator approval.

items.name: eve/thumbnail-studio
items.title: Thumbnail Studio Agent (eve)
items.description: Iterates YouTube and social thumbnail concepts with fal.ai and self-scores each against a clarity and no-clickbait bar for operator approval.

items.name: flue/thumbnail-studio
items.title: Thumbnail Studio Agent (flue)
items.description: Iterates YouTube and social thumbnail concepts with fal.ai and self-scores each against a clarity and no-clickbait bar for operator approval.

items.name: eve/x-growth
items.title: X Growth Agent (eve)
items.description: Monitors brand and keyword mentions on X and drafts engagement replies and original post ideas for operator approval.

items.name: flue/x-growth
items.title: X Growth Agent (flue)
items.description: Monitors brand and keyword mentions on X and drafts engagement replies and original post ideas for operator approval.
